*** 1 INJ *** AN EF-1 TORNADO WITH MAXIMUM WINDS OF 105 MPH TOUCHED DOWN JUST WEST OF HUNTSVILLE. THE TORNADO MOVED EAST FOR A PATH OF APPROXIMATELY FIVE MILES AND A MAXIMUM WIDTH OF 200 YARDS BEFORE LIFTING. A FEW HOMES WERE DAMAGED AND MULTIPLE TREES WERE UPROOTED. A MINOR INJURY OCCURED WHEN A DOUBLE WIDE HOME LOST ITS ROOF AND A COUPLE OF EXTERIOR WALLS. THE TORNADO LIFTED ABOUT 4 MILES EAST OF HUNTSVILLE.
